title: lithocarpus gracilis
intro: Lithocarpus gracilis, also known as the Himalayan Lithocarpus, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus gracilis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Lithocarpus gracilis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are typically consumed as a tea or tonic to promote overall health and well-being.
